description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.40.0

We've reorganized the menu and added features like nearby bus stop search and the ability to recommend "Places & Communities".

• Clearer menu organization — Home screen now shows large buttons for "Find Shops / Ride Bus / AED / Restrooms". Bus screen reorganized to "Find Nearby Bus Stops / Boarding Stop / Getting Off Stop"
• 🚏 Find nearby bus stops — Shows all bus stops within 300m of your location. For each stop, you can see next bus times by direction (northbound/southbound)
• 📍 Recommend "Places & Communities" — Now you can recommend not just shops, but also event venues and community spaces. You can also select Hanno City Hall and other city calendar events from here
• Organized shop list hearts — ❤️ One tap to recommend/unrecommend (tap gray heart to turn red). Shop search page button now uses the same heart
• "My favorites only" now uses a slide toggle — Made it easier to filter your recommended shops in the shop list
• Settings moved to My Friends page, camera now always available — Consolidated settings like display name on My Friends page, and invitation QR code opens instantly. Added QR code reader camera to footer
• Faster weather and event display — Caching frequently viewed data to reduce wait time
